subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! By God, the ocean of inner meanings hath verged, and verily it quickeneth all who dwell in the heavens and on earth. Blessed be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مهدی تالله قد ماج بحر المعانی و انه لمحی من فی السموات و الارضین طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @nearness and remoteness, @suffering and imprisonment
